author_identification.canonical_name_ar: الحسن بن محمد بن محمد ابن عمروك التيمي النيسابورىّ ثم الدمشقيّ، أبو علي، صدر الدين البكري
author_identification.scholarly_standing: Hadith scholar and compiler known for his collection of forty hadiths.

scholarly_context.tradition_position: A collection of forty hadiths, a common genre in Islamic scholarship.
scholarly_context.historical_significance: Part of the tradition of compiling forty hadiths, a significant genre in hadith literature.
scholarly_context.muhaqiq_reputation: محمد محفوظ is a known editor of Islamic texts, though specific reputation details are not widely documented.
